metadata.description: Brain Bank: a forkable semantic memory system with proactive digests and Karpathy-style compiled wikis. Captures from Slack, MCP, REST, Gmail, Calendar, Notion, voice, and ChatGPT GPT.

plugins.name: brain-bank
plugins.description: Slash-command-driven first-deploy guide for Brain Bank operators. Installs the /brain-bank-setup skill, which walks through Supabase project creation, secret stash, schema migrations, Edge Function deployment, and end-to-end smoke verification.
